summary: Risk Heatmap Layer Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All heatmap features verified - toggle ON/OFF, legend with zone counts, CSS animations, map zones render correctly.

TestCityHeatmapLive.test_heatmap_live_admin_access: PASS - Admin can access /api/operator/city-heatmap/live, returns cells with lat/lng/risk_level/composite_score
TestCityHeatmapLive.test_heatmap_live_operator_access: PASS - Operator can access heatmap live endpoint
TestCityHeatmapLive.test_heatmap_live_cell_fields: PASS - Cells have lat, lng, risk_level (safe/moderate/high/critical), composite_score

TestCityHeatmapStats.test_heatmap_stats_admin_access: PASS - Returns zone summary with total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones
TestCityHeatmapStats.test_heatmap_stats_returns_zone_counts: PASS - Stats have numeric zone counts

TestHeatmapRiskLevels.test_risk_level_values: PASS - All cells have valid risk_level in SAFE/MODERATE/HIGH/CRITICAL
TestHeatmapRiskLevels.test_coordinate_range: PASS - Coordinates are valid lat/lng values

heatmap_toggle.toggle_text_on: PASS - Shows 'RISK HEATMAP ON' when enabled
heatmap_toggle.toggle_text_off: PASS - Shows 'RISK HEATMAP OFF' when disabled
heatmap_toggle.toggle_functionality: PASS - Clicking toggles state ON→OFF→ON correctly

heatmap_legend.legend_hidden: PASS - Legend hidden when heatmap toggled OFF
heatmap_legend.zone_counts: PASS - Shows '12 High Risk', '108 Moderate', '624 zones analyzed'

map_features.leaflet_circles: PASS - 260 Leaflet interactive elements on map (heatmap zones + markers)
map_features.sos_markers: PASS - SOS markers render as red pulsing circles
map_features.map_bounds: PASS - Map auto-fits to show both incidents (Mumbai) and heatmap zones (Bangalore)

css_animations.heat_zone_critical: PASS - heat-zone-critical animation CSS injected (2.5s pulse)
css_animations.heat_zone_high: PASS - heat-zone-high animation CSS injected (3.5s pulse)

other_features.incident_feed: PASS - Incident Feed visible with SOS alerts
other_features.mute_button: PASS - Mute button present in header
other_features.header_metrics: PASS - ACTIVE SOS, AI ALERTS, GUARDIANS, INCIDENTS metrics visible

critical_code_review_comments: LiveSafetyMap.jsx: Clean implementation with Circle components for heatmap zones
LiveSafetyMap.jsx: HeatmapZone component properly filters SAFE zones (only non-SAFE render)
LiveSafetyMap.jsx: CSS animations correctly defined for critical (2.5s) and high (3.5s) zones
LiveSafetyMap.jsx: Toggle button has proper data-testid for testing
LiveSafetyMap.jsx: Legend shows zone counts computed from heatmapData prop
CommandCenterPage.jsx: Correctly fetches /api/operator/city-heatmap/live and passes heatmapData to LiveSafetyMap
CommandCenterPage.jsx: showHeatmap state properly toggles heatmap visibility
operator.py: RBAC properly enforced - only admin/operator can access heatmap endpoints
dynamic_risk_engine.py: Returns cells with lat/lng/risk_level/composite_score as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing heatmap data from dynamic_risk_engine (624 grid cells, 18 risk zones)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Heatmap Layer fully functional. Backend: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/live returns cells array with lat/lng/risk_level/composite_score. GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats returns zone summary. RBAC enforced - caregiver gets 403. Frontend: Command Center shows heatmap with 'RISK HEATMAP ON/OFF' toggle at top-right of map. When ON, legend shows zone counts (12 High, 108 Moderate, 624 total). Toggle OFF hides zones and legend. Critical zones have 2.5s pulse animation, High zones have 3.5s pulse. Map auto-fits bounds to include both incident markers (Mumbai) and heatmap zones (Bangalore).
verified_features: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats - returns zone counts (total, critical, high)
RBAC: admin/operator can access, caregiver gets 403, unauthenticated gets 401
Frontend: Command Center map shows heatmap zones as colored circles
Frontend: 'RISK HEATMAP ON/OFF' toggle button visible and functional at top-right
Frontend: Heatmap legend shows Critical, High, Moderate counts + total analyzed
Frontend: Toggling heatmap OFF hides risk zones from map
Frontend: Legend hidden when heatmap is OFF
Frontend: Critical zones have pulsing animation (heat-zone-critical class, 2.5s)
Frontend: High zones have pulsing animation (heat-zone-high class, 3.5s)
Frontend: Mute button works in Command Center header
Frontend: Incident feed shows SOS alerts correctly
Frontend: SOS markers render correctly on map as red pulsing circles
